ddls:
CREATE TABLE "voter_registration" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter registration entry */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual voter */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the voter */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the voter */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the voter */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the voter */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the voter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the voter */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party affiliation */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the voter's registration (active, inactive, pending, etc.) */,
  "registration_type" TEXT /* Type of registration (new, update, etc.) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the registration data was recorded */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the data applies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES party_affiliations ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "registered_voters_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is registered to vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registration_statistics" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county related to the statistics */,
  "total_registered" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the county */,
  "total_active" INTEGER /* Total number of active voters in the county */,
  "total_inactive" INTEGER /* Total number of inactive voters in the county */,
  "voter_age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the voters (e.g., 18-25, 26-35, etc.) */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of the voters (male, female, other) */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution of the voters */,
  "registration_trend" TEXT /* Trend of voter registration over time (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registration_statistics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_affiliations" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party (e.g., Libertarian, Republican) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the political party */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the political party was founded */,
  "current_leader" TEXT /* Current leader of the political party */,
  "party_website" TEXT /* Official website of the political party */,
  "party_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the political party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county related to the engagement */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the engagement metric */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the county */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (primary, general, special) */,
  "participation_rate" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who cast a vote */,
  "voter_turnout" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who cast a vote */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who cast a vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_engagement_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry, analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
